ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ip_addresses" (
  "ip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP address */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the IP address */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization associated with the IP address */,
  "last_visit" TEXT /* Last visit date for the IP address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of origin for the IP address */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of origin for the IP address */,
  "postal_code" INTEGER /* Postal code of origin for the IP address */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the IP address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the IP address */,
  "isp" TEXT /* ISP associated with the IP address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client owning the website */,
  "website_name" TEXT /* Name of the website */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the website was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the website was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_websites_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the client was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the client was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "website_traffic" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic entry */,
  "ip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IP address generating the traffic */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website being accessed */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages visited */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* Bandwidth used in MB */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  "referral_url" TEXT /* URL of the referring page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_website_traffic_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_website_traffic_ip_id FOREIGN KEY ("ip_id") REFERENCES ip_addresses ("ip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page visit */,
  "ip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the IP address making the visit */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website being visited */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the page visited */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_time" TEXT /* Time of the visit */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the visit in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_visits_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_visits_ip_id FOREIGN KEY ("ip_id") REFERENCES ip_addresses ("ip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_websites" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id", "website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_clients" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "client_id")
)
